title: ferray-ma: no std::ops overloads — must use masked_add/masked_sub functions
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's MaskedArray supports operator syntax: ma1 + ma2, ma1 * scalar, ma1 - ma2. ferray-ma requires calling free functions: masked_add(&ma1, &ma2), masked_sub(&ma1, &ma2). This is a significant ergonomic gap. Implement std::ops::{Add, Sub, Mul, Div} for MaskedArray<T, D> with mask union semantics. Also add scalar-MaskedArray operations (ma + 5.0).
